adjustment_details.description: Revenue Gross-Up: Cascadia books full FTE rate; Meridian books markup only
adjustment_details.cascadia_treatment: Books full FTE rate as revenue (includes pass-through cost)
adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Remove $12.5M/Q pass-through from Cascadia revenue. Corresponding COGS reduction nets to zero P&L impact.

adjustment_details.description: Revenue Gross-Up: COGS offset for pass-through cost removal
adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Remove $12.5M/Q pass-through from Cascadia COGS, matching the revenue reduction. Net P&L impact: zero.

adjustment_details.description: Revenue Gross-Up: COGS offset for pass-through cost removal
adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Remove $12.5M/Q pass-through from Cascadia COGS, matching the revenue reduction. Net P&L impact: zero.

adjustment_details.description: Benefits Loading: reclassify Cascadia benefits into delivery comp
adjustment_details.meridian_treatment: Benefits bundled into consultant compensation (single COGS line)
adjustment_details.cascadia_treatment: Benefits separated as distinct COGS line
adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Reclassify Cascadia benefits_cost ($20.86M) into delivery staff comp for combining view. Net COGS impact: zero.

adjustment_details.description: Revenue Gross-Up: Cascadia books full FTE rate; Meridian books markup only

adjustment_details.description: S&M Bundling: split Cascadia S&M into Sales (60%) and Marketing (40%)
adjustment_details.meridian_treatment: Separate Sales and Marketing OpEx lines

adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Split Cascadia sm_combined_expense ($39.08M) into Sales ($23.45M) and Marketing ($15.63M).

adjustment_details.description: Depreciation Methods: restate Cascadia from accelerated to straight-line
adjustment_details.adjustment_rationale: Cascadia accelerated D&A = $8.88M. Straight-line equivalent = $5.92M. Adjustment = $-2.96M (reduces D&A by 1/3). Increases operating profit by $2.96M.
